title: BFS vs DFS Comparison
description: Interactive comparison of Breadth-First Search and Depth-First Search graph traversal algorithms. Demonstrates the fundamental differences between queue-based BFS (level-by-level) and stack-based DFS (deep dive) approaches.
creator: Dan McCreary
subject: Breadth-First Search
Depth-First Search
Graph Traversal
Graph Algorithms
BFS
DFS
Algorithm Comparison
